fields.label: Permit Type Name
fields.description: e.g. Trade License, Building Permit, Food License

fields.label: Requires Location
fields.description: If checked, Permit save is blocked without a linked Location. Unchecked for mobile/no-fixed-premise permit types (v2).

fields.label: Renewal Behavior
fields.description: Annual = fixed renewal cycle. Consumed = no renewal, permit ends at project completion. ActiveLifecycle = recurring inspection/violation cycle (e.g. Food License).

fields.label: Is Transactional
fields.description: v2 hook. Reserved for shipment/per-event permit types (Customs). Not used in v1 logic.
